notes.text: sap.ui.richtexteditor.RichTextEditor: TinyMCE config property content_css is now used as an array
sap.ui.richtexteditor.RichTextEditor: set default font family via css file and not inline style
sap.ui.richtexteditor.RichTextEditor: Make qUnit tests version specific
sap.ui.richtexteditor.RichTextEditor: aria-readonly attribute is not added to the RTE container element when the editor is in read-only mode
